Kor Protocol Raises $7.5M at a $100M Valuation to Build the Creative Asset Clearinghouse
> Built on Base, KOR Protocol is building the creative asset clearinghouse for the AI Economy.
Source:
https://x.com/KorProtocol/status/2074527965946565015

tweet.text:
We've raised $7.5M at a $100M valuation to build the creative asset clearinghouse.

Capital provided by @1kxnetwork and @bcap, with continued support from existing investors @RepublicCrypto, @animocabrands, @alumniventures, @avax, @SevenXVentures, @Sfermion_, and @solana.

AI collapsed the cost of creating music, video, and media. What it hasn't solved is how talent gets discovered, matched to the right label or agency, and paid.

KOR is the clearinghouse that closes that gap, built on @base.

Detecting Counterfeiting after Zcash's Ironwood
Upcoming Ironwood network upgrade will use formal verification to mathematically eliminate all undetectable counterfeiting vulnerabilities from Zcash's protocol specification
Any remaining implementation-level bugs will be completely detectable in the public blockchain history

Deep Tech Eats Venture Capital
Deep tech investment has surged rapidly over the past two years, now accounting for 36% of total global venture capital funding as investors shift capital toward complex physical sciences and engineering
This massive reallocation of dollars is being heavily driven by an expanding demand for real-world solutions in defense, renewable energy, and semiconductors, alongside the extreme capital efficiency of AI-powered software startups that require less venture backing
https://www.av.vc/blog/deep-tech-eats-venture-capital-two-years-after-we-called-it-the-data-is-in

tweet.text:
If I was a new token going to launch I would:

Airdrop an initial amount to users -> drip feed a small airdrop everyday / week to new and existing users who are completing tasks such as championing the token or using products in the ecosystem.

The long-term opportunity isn't just about access to markets - it's about helping users put their assets to work.
